# cairn plugins verify

Run the conformance suite against every loaded plugin

## Help

```text
Run the conformance suite against every loaded plugin

Usage: verify [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --strict
          Treat tier-2 `pending` cases as failures

      --json
          Emit JSON instead of a human-readable report

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
